title: Reachable Nodes In Subdivided Graph
titleCn: 细分图中的可到达节点

testcases.input: edges = [[0,1,10],[0,2,1],[1,2,2]], maxMoves = 6, n = 3 Output: 13 Explanation: The edge subdivisions are shown in the image above. The nodes that are reachable are highlighted in yellow.
testcases.expectedOutput: 13 Explanation: The edge subdivisions are shown in the image above. The nodes that are reachable are highlighted in yellow.

testcases.input: edges = [[1,2,4],[1,4,5],[1,3,1],[2,3,4],[3,4,5]], maxMoves = 17, n = 5 Output: 1 Explanation: Node 0 is disconnected from the rest of the graph, so only node 0 is reachable.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Node 0 is disconnected from the rest of the graph, so only node 0 is reachable.
